message:
feat(conformance): search.h + locale + pthread + allocator + elf_loader parity

Large expansion of the differential conformance suite. Adds host-libc
FFI wrappers in the conformance library and matching harness tests that
compare frankenlibc behavior against glibc on the same inputs, plus new
JSON fixture scaffolding for every covered subsystem.

crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs (+1037 / -… net)
  * Imports std::cell::RefCell for the tsearch visitor callback
    (twalk demands a C function pointer, so state lives in a thread-
    local RefCell<Vec<…>> and the callback drains into it).
  * New `extern "C"` bindings to the host libc for:
      search.h  — hcreate/hsearch/hdestroy + *_r reentrant variants;
                  tsearch/tfind/tdelete/twalk; lfind/lsearch. Exposed
                  via `HostEntry`, `HostHsearchData`, `HostAction`,
                  `HostVisit`, `SearchCompareFn` typedefs so harness
                  tests can run both sides (host and frankenlibc)
                  on identical inputs.
      locale.h  — setlocale/newlocale/uselocale/freelocale/duplocale,
                  localeconv (passed through to host for golden
                  comparison).
      pthread   — condvar + mutex host wrappers (host_pthread_mutex_*,
                  host_pthread_cond_*), parameterized on mutex type
                  so each mutex conformance case runs against real
                  glibc semantics.
      dlfcn.h   — host_dlopen/dlsym/dlclose/dladdr/dlvsym for the
                  ELF-loader differential tests.
      inet.h    — host_inet_addr/inet_pton/inet_ntop already existed;
                  retained for reference.
      allocator — host_malloc/calloc/realloc/free/posix_memalign/
                  memalign/valloc/pvalloc/malloc_usable_size.
  * New public helpers that each harness test calls into:
      - run_search_hashmap_conformance (ENTER/FIND parity, overwrite
        semantics, capacity edges, reentrant *_r parity);
      - run_search_tree_conformance (tsearch/tfind/tdelete/twalk
        against host, visitor-order parity on sorted insertion);
      - run_locale_conformance (LC_ALL round-trips, uselocale thread-
        local scoping, localeconv field-by-field parity);
      - run_pthread_mutex_conformance (normal/recursive/errorcheck
        types; trylock EBUSY parity; unlock-by-non-owner EPERM);
      - run_pthread_cond_conformance (timedwait absolute/relative,
        broadcast wake-count parity);
      - run_allocator_conformance (alignment guarantees, usable-size
        reporting, realloc shrink/grow, free(NULL) no-op);
      - run_elf_loader_conformance (resolve symbols dlsym'd from the
        host to the same address the frankenlibc loader returns);
      - run_stdlib_{numeric,sort}_conformance (qsort stability,
        bsearch boundary behavior, atoi/strtol error cases);
      - run_inet_conformance (pton/ntop round-trip symmetry).

Harness tests
  + crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/search_ops_conformance_test.rs (new)
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/allocator_conformance_test.rs
    — fuller case matrix: pvalloc alignment, posix_memalign negative
      tests, realloc-to-zero freed-behavior parity.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/dlfcn_ops_conformance_test.rs
    — dlopen/dlsym parity against host libc for the shipped test .so.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/elf_loader_conformance_test.rs
    (+569) — new cases covering RELRO layout, GOT population,
    DT_NEEDED chain resolution, lazy vs. eager bindings.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/inet_ops_conformance_test.rs
    (+112) — adds IPv6 scoped-address parity and EINVAL fuzz cases.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/locale_ops_conformance_test.rs
    (+168) — adds `uselocale(LC_GLOBAL_LOCALE)` scoping, thread-
    safety parity across two spawned threads, LC_MESSAGES env fallback.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/pthread_{cond,mutex}_conformance_test.rs
    — promotes mutex/cond from smoke to fully differential.
  ~ crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/stdlib_{numeric,sort}_conformance_test.rs
    (+112 each) — bsearch boundary parity, qsort stability, strtoX
    error propagation.

Fixtures (tests/conformance/fixtures/*.json)
  * allocator, elf_loader, inet_ops, locale_ops, pthread_cond,
    pthread_mutex, stdlib_numeric, stdlib_sort: add the new
    scenarios' expected outputs so the parity runner has a stable
    golden to diff against.
  * search_ops.json: new fixture mirroring the search.h cases.

Related trackers: bd-r2oq (search.h task), bd-9chy.* (stdio epic
follow-ups), pthread-mutex/cond conformance promotion chain
referenced in recent matrix commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -148,23 +148,69 @@
   "binary_fixtures": [
     {
       "name": "libc_so_parsing",
-      "description": "Parse system libc.so.6 to validate header parsing against real binaries",
-      "path": "/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6",
-      "assertions": [
-        { "field": "class", "expected": "Class64" },
-        { "field": "data", "expected": "LittleEndian" },
-        { "field": "machine", "expected": "X86_64" },
-        { "field": "type", "expected": "SharedObject" }
-      ]
+      "description": "Parse system libc.so.6 and compare the Rust loader to readelf on stable ELF64 invariants",
+      "paths": [
+        "/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6",
+        "/lib64/libc.so.6",
+        "/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6",
+        "/usr/lib64/libc.so.6"
+      ],
+      "assertions": {
+        "class": "Elf64",
+        "data": "Lsb",
+        "machine": "X86_64",
+        "type": "Dyn",
+        "min_program_headers": 8,
+        "min_load_segments": 2,
+        "require_dynamic_segment": true,
+        "expect_relro": true,
+        "min_dynamic_symbols": 1000,
+        "required_symbols": ["malloc", "free", "printf"]
+      }
     },
     {
       "name": "libm_so_parsing",
-      "description": "Parse system libm.so.6 to validate symbol table parsing",
-      "path": "/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libm.so.6",
-      "assertions": [
-        { "field": "class", "expected": "Class64" },
-        { "field": "has_dynsym", "expected": true }
-      ]
+      "description": "Parse system libm.so.6 and verify dynamic symbol coverage against readelf",
+      "paths": [
+        "/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libm.so.6",
+        "/lib64/libm.so.6",
+        "/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libm.so.6",
+        "/usr/lib64/libm.so.6"
+      ],
+      "assertions": {
+        "class": "Elf64",
+        "data": "Lsb",
+        "machine": "X86_64",
+        "type": "Dyn",
+        "min_program_headers": 8,
+        "min_load_segments": 2,
+        "require_dynamic_segment": true,
+        "expect_relro": true,
+        "min_dynamic_symbols": 500,
+        "required_symbols": ["sin", "cos", "sqrt"]
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "ldso_so_parsing",
+      "description": "Parse the dynamic loader itself and verify loader-private symbols stay visible to the Rust parser",
+      "paths": [
+        "/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2",
+        "/lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2",
+        "/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2",
+        "/usr/lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2"
+      ],
+      "assertions": {
+        "class": "Elf64",
+        "data": "Lsb",
+        "machine": "X86_64",
+        "type": "Dyn",
+        "min_program_headers": 8,
+        "min_load_segments": 2,
+        "require_dynamic_segment": true,
+        "expect_relro": true,
+        "min_dynamic_symbols": 20,
+        "required_symbols": ["_dl_allocate_tls", "_dl_deallocate_tls", "_rtld_global"]
+      }
     }
   ]
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,136 @@
+{
+  "version": "v1",
+  "family": "search/ops",
+  "captured_at": "2026-04-16T00:00:00Z",
+  "description": "POSIX and XSI search.h operations validated against host glibc and frankenlibc ABI search entrypoints.",
+  "spec_reference": "POSIX.1-2017 search.h; X/Open System Interfaces for insque/remque",
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "hsearch_replace_existing_data",
+      "function": "hsearch",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 hsearch",
+      "inputs": {
+        "scenario": "replace_existing",
+        "table_capacity": 8,
+        "key": "alpha",
+        "first_data": 111,
+        "second_data": 222
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ENTER:1:111|ENTER:1:222|FIND:1:222",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "hsearch_find_missing_key",
+      "function": "hsearch",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 hsearch",
+      "inputs": {
+        "scenario": "find_missing",
+        "table_capacity": 8,
+        "key": "missing"
+      },
+      "expected_output": "FIND:0:NULL",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "hsearch_r_replace_existing_data",
+      "function": "hsearch_r",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 hsearch_r",
+      "inputs": {
+        "scenario": "replace_existing",
+        "table_capacity": 8,
+        "key": "beta",
+        "first_data": 7,
+        "second_data": 9
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ENTER:1:7|ENTER:1:9|FIND:1:9|FILLED:1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "tsearch_insert_and_find",
+      "function": "tsearch",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 tsearch",
+      "inputs": {
+        "keys": [10, 5, 15],
+        "find": [5, 99]
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ROOT:10|FIND:5=1|FIND:99=0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "tdelete_removes_leaf",
+      "function": "tdelete",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 tdelete",
+      "inputs": {
+        "keys": [10, 5, 15],
+        "delete": 5,
+        "find_after": [5, 10, 15]
+      },
+      "expected_output": "DELETE:5=1|FIND:5=0|FIND:10=1|FIND:15=1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "twalk_visit_sequence",
+      "function": "twalk",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 twalk",
+      "inputs": {
+        "keys": [10, 5, 15]
+      },
+      "expected_output": "10:preorder:0|5:leaf:1|10:postorder:0|15:leaf:1|10:endorder:0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "lfind_existing_index",
+      "function": "lfind",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 lfind",
+      "inputs": {
+        "base": [4, 8, 15, 16],
+        "key": 15
+      },
+      "expected_output": "INDEX:2",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "lsearch_appends_missing",
+      "function": "lsearch",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX.1-2017 lsearch",
+      "inputs": {
+        "base": [4, 8, 15],
+        "capacity": 4,
+        "key": 16
+      },
+      "expected_output": "INDEX:3|NEL:4|ARRAY:[4, 8, 15, 16]",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "insque_builds_chain",
+      "function": "insque",
+      "spec_section": "XSI insque",
+      "inputs": {
+        "values": [1, 2, 3]
+      },
+      "expected_output": "1(prev=NULL,next=2)|2(prev=1,next=3)|3(prev=2,next=NULL)",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "remque_middle_detaches_node",
+      "function": "remque",
+      "spec_section": "XSI remque",
+      "inputs": {
+        "values": [1, 2, 3],
+        "remove": 2
+      },
+      "expected_output": "1(prev=NULL,next=3)|2(prev=NULL,next=NULL)|3(prev=1,next=NULL)",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    }
+  ]
+}
